challenge.title: Korak 6
challenge.description:
Sada, nakon što izračunate napojnicu, morate je dodati u running_total kako biste dobili ukupan iznos računa.

Koristi operator += da dodaš vrednost promenljive tip promenljivoj running_total. Na kraju koristi print() da prikažeš tekst Total with tip: praćen razmakom i vrednošću promenljive running_total.

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
running_total = 0

num_of_friends = 4

appetizers = 37.89
main_courses = 57.34
desserts = 39.39
drinks = 64.21

running_total += appetizers + main_courses + desserts + drinks
print('Total bill so far:', running_total)

tip = running_total * 0.25
print('Tip amount:', tip)

tests.text: Trebalo bi da koristiš operater += za dodavanje vrednosti tip na tvoj running_total.
Trebalo bi da odštampate niz karaktera Total with tip: praćen razmakom i varijablom running_total.
tests.testString:
({
    test: () => runPython(`
import io, contextlib, re

buffer = io.StringIO()
with contextlib.redirect_stdout(buffer):
    exec(_code)

match = re.search(r"Total with tip: ([0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)?)", buffer.getvalue())

assert match
assert abs(float(match.group(1)) - ((37.89 + 57.34 + 39.39 + 64.21) * 1.25)) < 1e-6
    `)
})

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
running_total = 0

num_of_friends = 4

appetizers = 37.89
main_courses = 57.34
desserts = 39.39
drinks = 64.21

running_total += appetizers + main_courses + desserts + drinks
print('Total bill so far:', running_total)

tip = running_total * 0.25
print('Tip amount:', tip)

running_total += tip
print('Total with tip:', running_total)

final_bill = running_total / num_of_friends
print('Bill per person:', final_bill)

each_pays = round(final_bill, 2)
print('Each person pays:', each_pays)
